programme.title: Cagney and Lecey
programme.desc: An abandoned baby sets Cagney and Lacey on the trail of a baby broker and though deaf Mary Beth considers adopting her Meanwhile Chris new playwright boyfriend doesnt like her being a detective

programme.title: Starsky 320
programme.desc: Starsky 320

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Dom and String return to Doms birthplace when Dom learns that his daughter has died of a drug overdose After attending the funeral they return to California where Dom is arrested on suspicion of murdering his ex-wife String returns to the island to investigate the murder and learns that unsavory elements have begun taking over the seaside community where a casino is being developed String finds himself pondering a burning questiondoes the casinos developer have something to do with the deaths of Doms wife as well as his daughter

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A ventriloquists dummy becomes a vessel for evil when it comes to life and demands that its master commit murder

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Paroled to Die
programme.desc: Meline is taking money from his own bank to drill an oil well When he finds Doug Redferns bandana he has his gang rob his bank and uses the bandana to frame Doug When Doug is convicted but immediately paroled Meline has another plan that he thinks will put him away permanently

programme.title: Man of the Frontier
programme.desc: At the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious natureAt the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious nature

programme.title: In Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: Kentucky loses his horse in a rigged horse race and gets framed for the murder of a stagecoach driver

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate is headed for fame and fortune after a food company offers to patent her pickled preserve recipe

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys are struggling financially so Pepino secretly gets a job moonlighting as a singer at the El Tippi-Tin

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The wives horn in on Wilbur and Rogers duck hunting trip

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Rogers brother-in-law is begging Wilbur to write a follow-up hit song to Pretty Little Filly He wants it to be a blues number so Wilbur does his best to get Ed in a depressed mood

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A military test is conducted in the remote desert and headquartered in the resort where Kimble is working He learns of the top-secret operation and this knowledge puts him in great danger

programme.title: Tales from Crypt
programme.desc: In a research lab when two colleagues accidentally inject an experimental virus into their sleazy boss that will eventually kill him he tries to get revenge on them believing it was no accident

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Danny Darwin learns that his new tattoo might be more than just a tattoo

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lovely young invalid Meg Kinderly has to fend for herself after she gets trapped in her spacious family mansion with a vicious killer who has just wiped out most of her family and all of the servants But things arent that simple

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Reverend Nolan Powers is a fire and brimstone evangelist who has achieved tremendous fame wealth and power from his radio program thats broadcast on a national basis from his station WGOD A team of TV journalists do a story on Powers and his increasing popularity with the masses However a long-suppressed shameful secret from his dark family past threatens to destroy Powers and his current high profile status

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While working as a grounds keeper on a large estate owned by a kindly old lady she is brutally murdered in her own home Both her granddaughter and granddaughters husband implicate Eric But Eric knows he didnt do it and knows who did

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is kidnapped by a corrupt Southern politician who is dying of cancer and wants Eric to cure him and make him immortal by turning him into a werewolf

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When an Ambassador is the prime suspect in a murder investigation Nick ignores his orders and wrongly accuses the powerful politician

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A devious antiques dealer uses a magic lantern to travel back to the Civil War so he can steal artifacts from dead soldiers

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is investigating a madman who is blowing up high-rise buildings though CONTROL is not sure how he is doing it

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Agent 86 has amnesia after he hears about a KAOS plot

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: What happens when BJ and the Bear transport a circus veteran his granddaughter and their trained elephant through the turf of Wiley and the Fox

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol brings a French Poodle home from the pound and Mister Ed plans to get rid of Pierre as soon as possible

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur tries everything from hypnosis to psychiatry in order to cure Ed of his fear of heights

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans efforts to help a German baroness to escape are thwarted by Klink who has arranged for the transfer of a British prisoner who is senior to Colonel Hogan

programme.title: Hogans Hereos
programme.desc: When a British commando unit is captured before they can blow up a crucial German ammo dump Hogan and his men attempt to finish the job

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber and the guys try to make some money with some phony pearl oysters but their scheme backfires when a greedy Binghamton takes over their operation Then when Chief Urulu muscles in on Binghamtons business McHale and The Crew put a stop to the whole operation by taking advantage of an old native superstition and some Japanese technology

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Major complications develop when the guys send a chapter of Parkers war novel - Including a highly fictionalized account of his sinking of the biggest battleship in the Japanese fleet - To Parkers hometown girlfriend in an attempt to help him win her heart

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers favorite actress visits the base

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer gets assigned to MP duty

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find a headhunter tribes totem pole on the island The head on the top of it bears an uncanny resemblance to Gilligan--which comes in handy when the headhunters return to the island

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After Mary Ann watches Ginger perform on the island she hits her head giving her amnesia thus believing that she is Ginger Grant Everyone plays along until Mary Ann cant act or dance and her memory comes back

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When Jonathan buys Jennifer a gorgeous old car for her birthday she is less than thrilled -- but two Brits seem suspiciously eager to take it off her hands

programme.title: Newhart - 717
programme.desc: Newhart - 717

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Newhart

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Worried over a threat on his life the Secret Service drafts Gunny to protect the Emir of Katodd on his unscheduled refueling stop at Camp Hollister To top things off Polly is outside with animal rights activists protesting the Emir as he is claimed to be a camel killer

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A blow to the head gives the Skipper amnesia The Professor tries to cure him through hypnosis but he winds up believing that the other castaways are Japanese soldiers

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Ryans old school friend Ashley arrives and takes her and Mitch to a research lab where she and her husband work on developing an inanimate laser After Mitch Ryan and Ashley accidentally step into the laser they slide in time to a parallel universe where they must fight for their lives against the creatures inhabiting the world

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: When the mother ship hits dark matter the ship dos not begin to heal itself Zoor is left in an unconscious state and Sandoval takes control He decides it is time to liberate the Earth from the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians attempt to take over a military base that has been used as a secure storage area for much of the information regarding the 1953 invasion In particular they are seeking the location of Martians who are still in hibernation waiting to rejoin the invasion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A young loner who believes he is a vampire is accused of murdering his mothers boyfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After seemingly having no interest for so many episodes what happened to Jim Tressa is suddenly in Peru and sidetracked by a voice from her past on a radio

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Commander John Koenig the new commander of Moonbase Alpha leads the investigation of a mysterious disease at the station and uncovers evidence of a far greater looming disaster

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Henry Flatt a man the Dukes know whom is believed to be dead shows up alive He faked his death because he took some money from Boss Hogg and to avoid his wrath which included a burial at the local cemetery He learned that because no one has been buried at the cemetery for some time Boss can get the land to use for one of his projects and when he digs up his grave Boss will know he is not dead So he sets out to put another body in his grave so he gets an unclaimed body And the Dukes try to help him before things get out of hand

programme.title: Lonesome Dove OY 122
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove OY 122

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Three runaways from Oregon George Jack and Sharon Morgan are squatting in an abandoned house Sharon is very sick but money is very limited George decided to break into a local pharmacy after hours to obtain some medicine

programme.title: Mission Impossible

programme.title: Arena

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind
